extracted.title: ETNG Pipeline Conditions for 04/18/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day April 18, 2026, East Tennessee Natural Gas (ETNG) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to ETNG's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding ETNG's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations
- Topside
- Deliveries To Texas Eastern
- Boyd's Creek (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes)
- Tracy City (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes)
- Fordtown West (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes)

OFO / Imbalance Notice
- OFO: ---
- Customer Specific OFO: ---
- Hourly Customer Specific OFO: ---
- Action Alert: No DS - System Wide issued April 18, 2026. 500 Dth / 5% Tolerance
- Imbalances Warnings: ---

Systemwide Notes:
ETNG requires any imbalance payback be coordinated through your Operations Account Representative.

If necessary, ETNG will utilize any provision of its tariff to ensure system integrity including the issuance of customer specific or system wide OFOs.

Effective October 1, 2025, MR 59200 - SNG Whitfield will be restricted to 0 Dth / d until further notice due to SNG pressures being lower than ETNG's typical operating pressure. Also, effective October 1, 2025, MR 59311 - SNG Bradley will be limited to its meter capacity of 31,000 Dth/d.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
